calc_product_agentforce_description: Drive Operational Efficiency & Growth at Scale
calc_home_description: Select your industry and company size to help set default values and recommendations.
calc_estimation_description: Select and configure a use case that you want to add to your estimation. You will have the opportunity to add more later.
calc_data_foundation_description: The information you enter here has an impact across multiple Data 360 use cases. You will have the opportunity to edit your answers.
calc_configure_use_last_message_first: The results of this tool are provided for illustrative purposes only to help you consider Agentforce as a business solution and should not be relied upon. Actual results may vary and are not a guarantee or commitment regarding any potential or actual financial results or other benefits you may achieve. Individual results depend on factors including but not limited to implementation practices, user adoption, configurations, business practices, market conditions, and external economic factors.
calc_configure_use_last_message_second: Initial benefits of Salesforce Agentforce achieved within weeks; full transition assumed to happen over three years. Salesforce licenses, Data 360 credit cost, and implementation costs not included. The Flex Credits for Agentforce use are estimates. Actual Agentforce costs may vary based on architectural design, data requirements, and specific use case.
calc_configure_use_last_message_third: All calculations above done in US dollars unless otherwise noted.
calc_employee_template_license_label: Which Agentforce License would you like to use to access this agent template?
calc_employee_template_license_descripti: Agentforce add ons (e.g Agentforce for Sales) provide access to certain Cloud actions and unmetered employee-facing AI usage per licensed user
Agentforce 1 Editions provide the same benefits as Agentforce add ons, but also come with platform access and other benefits, such as 1M Flex Credits per org per year
calc_employee_template_seats_label: How many seats do you need?
calc_estimation_step_header_description: View and refine your combined product pricing estimation for one year.
calc_formula_keys_profiles_desc: Your # of Customers X Your # of Sources
calc_formula_keys_total_dataset_desc: Unified Profiles + Profiles + Your Related Data
calc_delete_use_case_message: Deleting the use case will loose all the information you entered.
calc_save_estimation_description: The calculator will generate an obscure, but publicly accessible URL. Anyone with the public share link will be able to access and update your estimate.
calc_estimate_saved_successfully: Your Estimate has been saved successfully.
calc_copy_link_description: Copy and save or bookmark this link for your records. You must use the link below to retrieve or share your estimate. This link will expire after 1 year.
calc_download_report_heading: Download your custom Flex Credit Pricing Report.
calc_export_report_heading: Export your custom Flex Credit Pricing Report.
calc_download_report_intro: Let's break down your pricing estimate across Agentforce and Data 360.
calc_download_report_details: Download your report for details on the first year using products on the Flex Credit:
calc_download_report_item1: Combined pricing overview for Agentforce and Data 360
calc_download_report_item2: Pricing estimate breakdown by product use case
calc_download_questions_help: Questions? We're here to help. Call us at
calc_download_form_heading: Fill out the form to download your report.
calc_privacy_text: We value your privacy. To learn more, visit our

calc_save_estimation_heading: Save your custom Flex Credit pricing estimate
calc_save_estimation_subtitle: Get a shareable link to your tailored pricing estimate for Agentforce and Data 360.
calc_save_estimation_details: Save your estimate to receive a unique URL for easy access and collaboration:
calc_save_estimation_item1: Share with your team: Send your unique link to stakeholders to view or edit the estimate.
calc_save_estimation_item2: Refine your numbers: Anyone with the link can update inputs as your business needs evolve.
calc_save_estimation_item3: Full pricing transparency: View your year-one estimate across Agentforce and Data 360.
calc_save_estimation_item4: Detailed breakdown: Refer back to see exactly how your Flex Credit estimates were calculated.
calc_save_form_heading: Generate my Unique URL for my estimation
calc_estimate_ready_to_share: Your estimate is ready to share.
calc_copy_link_instruction: Copy your unique link below to save your progress or collaborate with your team.
calc_copy_link_note: Note: Anyone with this unique link can view and update your pricing breakdown.
calc_legal_disclaimer: The results of this tool are provided for illustrative purposes only to help you consider Agentforce and Data 360 as business solutions and should not be relied upon. These estimates are based on the inputs provided and do not constitute a guarantee, price lock, or formal commitment regarding actual costs. Actual Agentforce and Data 360 credit consumption may vary based on individual architectural design, data requirements, and specific technical configurations. Actual costs are subject to change based on the final scope of the business solution and data processing needs. All calculations are performed in US dollars unless otherwise noted.
calc_pdf_agentforce_bullet1: Support customers across channels 24/7 using natural responses
calc_pdf_agentforce_bullet2: Resolve cases with speed and accuracy by grounding every answer in trusted data
calc_pdf_agentforce_bullet3: Define clear security guardrails and seamlessly escalate interactions to human support reps
calc_pdf_data360_bullet1: Scale coaching with autonomous role-play facilitation, based on deal stage to practice pitching, handling objections, and negotiation
calc_pdf_data360_bullet2: Get personalized feedback with insights, areas of improvement, and actionable next steps to advance deals grounded in CRM data
